---
applyTo: ["**/*.js", "**/*.jsx", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx"]
description: "JavaScript and TypeScript implementation and validation rules."
---

# JavaScript TypeScript Rules

- Prefer TypeScript types when available.
- Keep async failures explicit.
- Do not add dependencies for simple local utilities.
- Preserve component and state patterns already used by the project.
- Run existing package scripts for typecheck, lint, test, or build.
